climate.description: Tropical dry season in March: hot, humid, sunny with low rain risk.

fondo_rating.scoring_notes: Migrated from gravel-race-automation. Original score: 70. adventure dimension dropped, road_surface added. Score recalculated: 67.

course_description.character: Rolling paved roads departing Subic Bay Freeport Zone into the scenic Bataan province, featuring coastal views, moderate climbs, and a fast return to the finish. Long course emphasizes endurance with qualifier potential for top age-groupers.
course_description.signature_challenge: The 84-mile loop through Bataan province, mirroring pro routes with scenic yet demanding paved roads.
suffering_zones: Bataan Outbound Climb: Early punchy ascent out of Subic Bay into Bataan roads, testing legs in humid conditions.
Mid-Route Rollers: Constant undulations through picturesque countryside accumulating the 4000 ft gain.
Return Push: Final efforts back to Subic Bay with fatigue setting in under tropical sun.

logistics.lodging_strategy: Subic Bay hotels and resorts abundant; book early for freeport zone proximity.
logistics.transport: Hosted in cyclist-friendly Subic Bay Freeport Zone with exhibition center start/finish. Expect smooth GFNY operations including packet pickup and aid stations.

history.origin_story: Part of GFNY World series, with roots in events like PRUride Philippines Gran Fondo. Established as GFNY chapter with competitive long course rankings.

final_verdict.one_liner: GFNY Philippines delivers pro-level road racing in tropical paradise.

citations.label: PRUride Phillipines to attract over 5,000 cyclists across Southeast Asia
